question: Which quarter appears to have the best overall platform performance based on the stacked bar chart?

options.A: Q1 has the best overall performance.
options.B: Q3 has the best overall performance.
options.C: The chart cannot be used to determine overall performance because it stacks unrelated metrics with different units.
options.D: Q4 has the best overall performance because it has the highest total stacked value.

explanation: The chart stacks unrelated metrics (Page Views, Server Uptime, etc.) into a single total. These metrics have different units and meanings (e.g., counts, temperatures, consumption), so adding them together creates a meaningless sum. The stacked height cannot be used to assess overall performance. Only individual metric comparisons are valid.
